name: procurement-connectors
description: Unified search across public procurement / bidding sources: SAM.gov, HigherGov, BidBanana, Texas ESBD, Bonfire (UT Dallas, Lewisville), Jaggaer (UNT, Texas A&M), Ionwave (Denton), OpenGov, DemandStar, PlanetBids.
long_description: An MCP connector hub for federal, state, local, and university procurement opportunities. Keyless sources (Texas ESBD/TxSmartBuy, Bonfire RSS) work out of the box; credentialed sources (SAM.gov, HigherGov, BidBanana, OpenGov) activate when you provide their keys. Every source declares its reliability so results are honest: API-backed sources return structured data, while client-side-rendered portals (Jaggaer, DemandStar, PlanetBids) return a verified portal link instead of fabricated rows.

tools.name: procurement_list_sources
tools.description: List sources with platform, auth, reliability, and readiness.

tools.name: procurement_search
tools.description: Search a single procurement source for opportunities.

tools.name: procurement_search_all
tools.description: Search across multiple sources and aggregate results.

tools.name: procurement_get_opportunity
tools.description: Fetch one opportunity by id (where supported).

opengov_base_url.title: OpenGov Search URL
opengov_base_url.description: Per-agency JSON search URL with {q} and {limit} placeholders.

govcloud_base_url.title: GovCloud Search URL
govcloud_base_url.description: Endpoint for whatever 'GovCloud' source you mean (no public portal by that exact name was found).
